heading: Transferred
label: 1200 to 1204 Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 1200, R.S. § 1737; , , which related to penalty for a false certificate as to ownership of property, was transferred to .Apr. 5, 1906, ch. 1366, § 334 Stat. 100section 4218 of this titleSection 1201, R.S. § 1745; , , which related to regulation of fees by President, was transferred to .Apr. 5, 1906, ch. 1366, § 334 Stat. 100section 4219 of this titleSection 1202, R.S. § 1746, which related to medium for payment of fees, was transferred to .section 4220 of this titleSection 1203, R.S. § 1750; , , which related to depositions and notarial acts and to perjury and other offenses, was transferred to .Apr. 5, 1906, ch. 1366, § 334 Stat. 100section 4221 of this titleSection 1204, , as added , , which related to authentication of documents of State of Vatican City by consular officer in Rome, was transferred to .act June 26, 1936, ch. 640, § 6AJune 25, 1938, ch. 68252 Stat. 1163section 4222 of this title
